verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Deeper In Thy love, Oh Jesus Doth my spirit cry to go. Until all my life is hidden Deep within the cleansing flow.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Deeper in that holy life 'Til I'm lost with Christ in God. Hidden with my blessed Lord While I walk this earthly sod.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Humbly must I walk with Jesus In the paths that He doth lead. Never falter, never murmur Always to His voice give heed.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Daily must I seek to please Him Whether it bring joy or pain. I shall know then just how blessed Is the worth of Heav'nly gain.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Deeper, 'til at last in Glory In His likeness I shall come. Where the saints of all the ages Shall receive their welcome home.
